faqs.answer: Pest emergencies include sudden rodent sightings, large cockroach infestations, bee or wasp nests near entryways, bed bug discoveries, or any situation posing immediate health or safety risks. We respond 24/7 to urgent calls throughout Forest Hills and can typically arrive within 2-4 hours.
